meaning: vt.大量的用,厚厚地涂n.大量
examples: If your skin is dry, you have to slather on moisturizer to soften it.
I cover up, slather on the SPF50 and avoid the midday sun.
Slather yourself with sunscreen before you leave home.
We all know at least a few ways to help prevent cancer: stop smoking, slather on the sunscreen.
The weather is almost invariably cooperative and cloudy skies are rare, so all are advised to frequently slather on sunscreen under the notoriously brutal Uruguayan sun.
